Version 0.1
define altrROOM(numeric room,
numeric ca,
numeric val)
ALTR val val val
Version 0.1
define centrey(agent a)
POSY
define changeCaOfROOM(numeric ca,
numeric val)
ALTR val val val
define numeric DEBUG
define end()
QUIT KILL OWNER
define numeric F_CREATURE
define numeric F_INVISIBLE
define numeric F_VISIBLE1
define numeric F_VISIBLE2
define numeric G_DOOR
define numeric G_GOODPLANT
define numeric G_GUI
define numeric G_HAND
define numeric G_SEED
define numeric G_SYSTEM
define numeric G_WEATHER
define numeric G_ZERO
define pre()
INST LOCK TICK 0
Version 0.1
define rainCA(numeric ca,
numeric val)
ALTR ROOM TARG
define numeric S_BACKTOASTART
define numeric S_BUBBLE_HANDLING

1000 : ‘Turn on Event’
